narrative: Connect analytics sources for Sidecar website: either (a) connect Google Search Console to the Sidecarcapitalpartners Ahrefs project (Settings → connect GSC), or (b) export GSC Performance (last 6-12 months CSV) + GA4 Traffic Acquisition (last 6-12 months) and share so Max can build baseline + 6/12-month targets tied to Field Notes launch
title: Decide analytics path for Sidecar website (connect GSC to Ahrefs OR export GSC+GA4 last 6-12 months)
